text: 2026-07-09: all locally-reproducible causes fixed (see commit 'Backend availability probes may never propagate errors'). Root classes: (1) core propagated errors from backend available() probes — now guarded everywhere with .amatrix_backend_available_safe; (2) test helpers turned unbuildable/stale backend source trees into hard errors — now degrade to installed package or skip-with-reason; (3) arrayfire guards checked package-load not native runtime; (4) benchmark workers picked up stale source .so. Full local suite 3650/0/0/4. CLOSE CRITERION: next 7 nightly runs green (quality-tracking §8.1).
